title: Unpruned-MTP variant quantization ladder (LOCKED DECISION 6 addendum)
checkpoint: models/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-judge-v4-s1-merged (256/256 experts, MTP head retained, block_count 41)
noise_floor_finding: Second independent reproduction of the pruned ladder's non-monotonicity: Q6 (-0.07pp) and Q5 (+0.12pp) both sit ~3pp ABOVE Q8 (-3.14pp), and Q5 sits above its own f16 source. No degradation mechanism produces that ordering — single-seed rung-to-rung rho deltas at n=121 are sampling noise. Q8's band failure is not treated as a real signal; it is recorded as measured.
ship_rationale: Q5_K_M ships: smallest rung within the pre-registered ±2pp band of this checkpoint's own f16 floor with ZERO parse failures across n=121 (the selection rule locked in LOCKED DECISION 6, identical in kind to the pruned ladder's rule). NOT selected on rho point-ordering — established noise. Contrast with the pruned ladder, where Q5 produced 1/121 parse failure and Q6 shipped; this checkpoint's Q5 ran clean.
pending_before_upload: MTP speculative-decoding smoke (--spec-type draft-mtp) on the ship rung
